title: [LoopUnroll] Support parallel reductions for minmax
author: madhur13490
description:
This patch
* Supports parallel reductions for min/max operations in LoopUnroller.
* Adds relevant test (including intrinsics) and their 8x unroll version.
* Renames flag -unroll-add-parallel-reduction to -unroll-parallel-reduction.

Planning to take support for vector types in the next patch.

tests.test_body:
define i32 @test_add(ptr %src, i64 %n, i32 %start) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %rdx = phi i32 [ %start, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %iv.next = add i64 %iv, 1
  %gep.src = getelementptr i32, ptr %src, i64 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep.src, align 1
  %rdx.next = add i32 %rdx, %l
  %ec = icmp ne i64 %iv.next, 1000
  br i1 %ec, label %loop, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret i32 %rdx.next
}

define float @test_fmax_reduction_8x_unroll(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %max = phi float [ 0xFFF0000000000000, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load float, ptr %gep.a, align 4
  %cmp = fcmp nnan nsz ogt float %max, %0
  %rdx.next = select i1 %cmp, float %max, float %0
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi float [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret float %res
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.count", i32 8}

define i32 @test_smin_reduction(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %min = phi i32 [ 2147483647, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load i32, ptr %gep.a, align 4
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %min, %0
  %rdx.next = select i1 %cmp, i32 %min, i32 %0
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi i32 [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret i32 %res
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.count", i32 2}

define float @test_fmin_reduction_8x_unroll(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %min = phi float [ 0x7FF0000000000000, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load float, ptr %gep.a, align 4
  %cmp = fcmp nnan nsz olt float %min, %0
  %rdx.next = select i1 %cmp, float %min, float %0
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi float [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret float %res
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.count", i32 8}

define float @test_fmin_reduction_intrinsic(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %min = phi float [ 0x7FF0000000000000, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load float, ptr %gep.a, align 4
  %rdx.next = call float @llvm.minnum.f32(float %min, float %0)
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi float [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret float %res
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.minnum.f32(float, float) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.count", i32 2}

define float @test_fadd_no_reassoc(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %rdx = phi float [ 0.000000e+00, %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds nuw float, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load float, ptr %gep.a, align 16
  %rdx.next = fadd float %rdx, %0
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi float [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret float %res
}

!0 = distinct !{!0, !1}
!1 = !{!"llvm.loop.unroll.count", i32 2}

define i32 @test_smax_reduction(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]

  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load i32, ptr %gep.a, align 4
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 %max, %0
  %rdx.next = select i1 %cmp, i32 %max, i32 %0
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi i32 [ %rdx.next, %loop ]

define <4 x float> @test_vector_fmin_reduction_intrinsic(ptr %a, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %rdx = phi <4 x float> [ splat (float 0x7FF0000000000000), %entry ], [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  %gep.a = getelementptr inbounds nuw <4 x float>, ptr %a, i64 %iv
  %0 = load <4 x float>, ptr %gep.a, align 16
  %rdx.next = call <4 x float> @llvm.minnum.v4f32(<4 x float> %rdx, <4 x float> %0)
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop, !llvm.loop !0

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  %res = phi <4 x float> [ %rdx.next, %loop ]
  ret <4 x float> %res
}

  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, %n
